title: Linked List

statement.markdown:
## Linked List

Implement a singly linked list with the following methods:

### Requirements

1. `insertAtHead(value)`: inserts a new node at the head of the linked list
2. `insertAtTail(value)`: inserts a new node at the end of the linked list
3. `removeHead()`: removes the head node from the linked list
4. `removeTail()`: removes the tail node from the linked list
5. `contains(value)`: checks if the linked list contains a node with the given value
6. `printList()`: prints the linked list

constraints: The linked list should not contain duplicates
The linked list should be able to handle large numbers of nodes
